contexts.context: ...on the way, this mishap was almost a foregone <mark>conclusion</mark>.     That the sexual relationship between Auden and Kallman...
...than three months here consecutively.      A word in <mark>conclusion</mark>: if this in my view entirely unjustifiable nonsense...
...have known Fridau, and still is, the indkispendsable <mark>conclusion</mark> to lunches even of the humbler, everyday sort...
